currency.displayRule: Store and calculate rewards/costs as totalCopper, then display normalized platinum, gold, silver, copper from highest to lowest and hide zero denominations.

household.notes: Adult-only rewards are private OurSpace reward placeholders and must follow local law and age requirements. Card-renewal alert items are intentionally omitted because Google Calendar alerts handle them.

rewardEarningScale.difficulty: Very hard / care support / appointment / major chore
Dino task takeover / high-burden caregiver support

roleNotes: Paid caregiver work blocks are included.
Duck collection and Jasper-specific favorites are included.

tasks.task: Help Dino with oxygen/respiratory supplies setup
Help Dino prepare for doctor appointment
Help Dino make important phone call
Help Dino with one paperwork task
Help Dino respond to one message
Take over Dino’s dishes, small batch
tasks.notes: Extra because dishes are Dino’s chore

tasks.task: Take over Dino’s dishes, full sink/load
Take bathroom trash to main trash
Put new bag in bathroom trash
Take bedroom trash to main trash
Put new bag in bedroom trash
Clear bed surface / reset bed area
Take living room trash to main trash
Put new bag in living room trash
Do inventory of what is needed

takeoverRules.situation: Squishy helps Dino start a task
Squishy does half of Dino’s task
Squishy fully takes over Dino’s task
Squishy fully takes over dishes, trash, laundry, fridge, shower support, paperwork, phone call, or doctor admin

roleNotes: Chores are limited to trash to chute if energy allows, sink dishes when Squishy brings them, and laundry.
Wheelchair-first planning, seated/bed-level options, tiny steps, rest/recovery, oxygen-aware pacing, and effort/safety rewards are supported.
Nicotine vape fluid is included as a 21+ nicotine reward item.

tasks.notes: Higher because depression/MS/autism can block this
Routine safety check, not medical advice

tasks.task: Put oxygen supplies safely within reach

tasks.notes: Rest is part of the task

tasks.task: Transfer/setup with shower chair assistance if needed
Open Onyx and name today’s level
Do one “I am still here” check-in
Name withdrawal without fixing it yet
Tell Squishy “I’m withdrawn but I love you”
Look at phone notifications for 2 minutes
Send “I care, I’m just low energy” message
Brush one cat for a little bit
Sit at sink / set up dish position
Wash one sink load of dishes
Take trash to chute if you have energy
Build Foundry VTT prep for 15 minutes
Use music tool for one idea

storeRewards.notes: Edibles only for Dino due asthma
